title: prunella vulgaris var. pinnatifida
intro: Prunella vulgaris var. pinnatifida, also known as self-heal or heal-all, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris var. pinnatifida include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce stress. Prunella vulgaris var. pinnatifida is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can also be used in infusions or added to skincare products to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
